# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a security group for EC2 instances. Allow SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) access from anywhere. Our development team works remotely and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

Resources:
    MySecurityGroupEC2Instance:
        Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
        Properties:
            GroupDescription: Allow SSH, HTTP & HTTPS from anywhere in the VPC 
            
            VpcId: !ref VPCStack # Reference to our existing vpc stack (VPC)  
        
            SecurityGroupIngress:   
                - CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'    
                  FromPort: 22             
                  ToPort: 22              
                  
                - CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'     
                  FromPort: 80            
                  ToPort: 80           
                
                - CidrIp: '0.0.0.0/0'      
                  FromPort: 443          
                  ToPort: 443
